nasb.text: for it is on this day that atonement shall be made for you to cleanse you; you will be clean from all your sins before the Lord.

esv.text: For on this day shall atonement be made for you to cleanse you. You shall be clean before the Lord from all your sins.

cnv.text: 因為在這一天，他要為你們贖罪，使你們潔淨，脫離你們一切罪孽，使你們在耶和華面前成為潔淨。

ccb.text: 因为在这一天要为你们赎罪，使你们在耶和华面前洁净。
